parsed_output.justification: All other players claim village roles (Paul as Robber, James as Seer, Laura and Mitchell as Villagers). The only unverified claim is Justin’s assertion that he was the Troublemaker, yet he repeatedly denies being a Seer or Insomniac and admits to having switched people without specifying whom. His inconsistent statements and the fact that no other player has confirmed a werewolf identity suggest he is the lone werewolf. Eliminating Justin maximizes the chance of removing the werewolf.
